🚀 We’re Hiring: Senior GenAI Developer (Python) | Remote

Are you passionate about Generative AI and building next-generation enterprise solutions? This is your chance to work on cutting-edge AI innovations!

📍 Location: Remote (Kerala)
💼 Experience: 6+ Years
📄 Type: Contract to Hire

💡 What You’ll Do:
• Build and scale enterprise GenAI platforms using LLMs
• Develop cloud-native AI solutions (preferably on Azure)
• Work on prompt engineering, RAG pipelines & AI agent workflows
• Lead end-to-end development from concept to deployment

• Strong Python expertise (PyTorch, Pandas, NumPy)
• Hands-on experience with GenAI frameworks (LangChain, Semantic Kernel, etc.)
• Experience with Azure AI/ML services
• Solid understanding of LLMs and AI system design

🌟 Why Join Us?
• Work on cutting-edge AI innovations
• High-impact role with ownership
• Remote flexibility with long-term opportunity

📩 Interested? Apply now!

We are hiring Oracle AI Architect to join our Client.

 🎓 Graduation: B.Tech / B.E / BCA / B.Sc

10+ years in enterprise architecture, with at least 3+ years in AI/ML or Generative AI, Agentic AI solutioning.

Experience in Python, SQL, REST APIs
Familiarity with security, compliance, and governance in cloud/enterprise environments.

extracted.full_content:
Tharun Kumar Boobathi

Driving Explosive Growth for IT & Product Companies | Lead Gen & Sales Specialist | Turning Prospects into Profits @Pattem Digital

🚀 We're Hiring:  QA Engineer (Automation) | 2–4 Years | SaaS & Microservices

Are you a QA engineer who lives and breathes automation, API testing, and quality-first thinking? We want you on our team.

We're looking for a skilled QA Engineer to own test strategy and automation coverage across our cloud-native SaaS platform. You'll be building and maintaining frameworks, validating microservices, and driving release quality not just finding bugs, but preventing them.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔍 What You'll Own
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✅ Architect and maintain Selenium-based automation frameworks integrated into CI/CD
✅ Lead end-to-end release validation functional, regression, integration & API layers
✅ Conduct API and contract testing using Postman, RestAssured, or Pact
✅ Design test data management strategies aligned with production-like environments
✅ Define and track quality metrics: defect leakage, automation rate, release readiness
✅ Mentor junior QA engineers on best practices and automation
✅ Log detailed defects in JIRA and support UAT & release readiness cycles

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🛠 What You Bring
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔹 2–4 years of QA experience in SaaS, multi-tenant, or cloud environments
🔹 Strong hands-on skills in test automation Java, JS/TS, or Python + Selenium
🔹 Deep understanding of RESTful APIs, OAuth, JSON/XML validation
🔹 Experience with CI/CD pipelines, Docker/Kubernetes, and cloud infra testing
🔹 Solid SDLC, STLC, and Agile methodology knowledge
🔹 Ability to analyze logs, APIs, and observability dashboards for root cause validation
🔹 Hands-on with NoSQL and basic data validation

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⭐ Bonus Points If You Have
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔸 Performance testing experience JMeter, Gatling, or k6
🔸 Familiarity with AI-assisted testing, self-healing locators, or accessibility automation
🔸 Exposure to security testing and vulnerability validation

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📌 Why Join Us?
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
You'll work on a modern, cloud-native product with a team that values quality as a first-class citizen not an afterthought. You'll have real ownership, real impact, and the opportunity to shape our QA culture from the ground up.

📩 Interested? Drop your resume to the Email-aliya.u@pattemdigital.com or comments or DM me directly.
🔁 Know someone perfect for this role? Tag them or share this post  you might change someone's career path today!

#QAEngineering #QualityAssurance #TestAutomation #Selenium #APITesting #SaaS #Microservices #CICD #HiringNow #QAJobs #SoftwareTesting #AutomationTesting #TechJobs #DevOps #OpenToWork #JobAlert #RestAssured #Postman #AgileQA #CloudTesting #hiring #Jobseeking #hirngITJOB #ITQA

🚀 We're Hiring:  QA Engineer (Automation) | 2–4 Years | SaaS & Microservices

Are you a QA engineer who lives and breathes automation, API testing, and quality-first thinking? We want you on our team.

We're looking for a skilled QA Engineer to own test strategy and automation coverage across our cloud-native SaaS platform. You'll be building and maintaining frameworks, validating microservices, and driving release quality not just finding bugs, but preventing them.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔍 What You'll Own
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✅ Architect and maintain Selenium-based automation frameworks integrated into CI/CD
✅ Lead end-to-end release validation functional, regression, integration & API layers
✅ Conduct API and contract testing using Postman, RestAssured, or Pact
✅ Design test data management strategies aligned with production-like environments
✅ Define and track quality metrics: defect leakage, automation rate, release readiness
✅ Mentor junior QA engineers on best practices and automation
✅ Log detailed defects in JIRA and support UAT & release readiness cycles

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🛠 What You Bring
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔹 2–4 years of QA experience in SaaS, multi-tenant, or cloud environments
🔹 Strong hands-on skills in test automation Java, JS/TS, or Python + Selenium
🔹 Deep understanding of RESTful APIs, OAuth, JSON/XML validation
🔹 Experience with CI/CD pipelines, Docker/Kubernetes, and cloud infra testing
🔹 Solid SDLC, STLC, and Agile methodology knowledge
🔹 Ability to analyze logs, APIs, and observability dashboards for root cause validation
🔹 Hands-on with NoSQL and basic data validation

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Business Analyst | Tech & Talent Connector HRBP | Driving Impact at The AI Matters

📌 Job Title: Forward Deployment Engineer – GTM AI
📍 Location:  (Remote)
💰 Rate: ₹ 2,00,000 / Month
⏳ Duration: 6–12 Months Contract
🕒 Experience: 5–10 Years


---

🧾 Role Overview

We are hiring a Forward Deployment Engineer (GTM AI) to work closely with Sales, RevOps, and Customer Success teams. This is a highly execution-driven role focused on building and deploying AI-powered solutions that directly impact revenue and business outcomes.


---

⏰ Work Timings

11:00 AM – 11:00 PM (Flexible 3–4 hour break)
Must be available for late evening client calls


---

🚀 Key Responsibilities

Design and deploy production-grade AI solutions in fast-paced sprints

Identify automation opportunities with business teams

Integrate AI systems with GTM tools (Salesforce, Gong, Outreach)

Build AI agents and workflows to improve productivity

Translate technical solutions into measurable business impact

Ensure system reliability via monitoring and quality checks



---

✅ Requirements

4+ years of experience in software/product engineering

Hands-on experience with Salesforce and GTM tools

Strong experience with AI/LLM-based workflows

Understanding of Sales, Customer Success, and GTM processes

Experience with system integrations and event-driven architecture

Strong communication and stakeholder management skills



---

⭐ Nice to Have

Experience in SalesTech / revenue-focused platforms

Exposure to AI production and automation systems

Experience building internal tools and data-driven workflows



---

🛠️ Primary Skills

Salesforce & GTM | AI/LLM | Sales | Customer Success | GTM Processes

We are hiring a Staff Engineer – GTM AI to lead the technical vision and architecture of an AI platform supporting GTM systems. This role focuses on building scalable, reliable, and high-performance AI-driven systems aligned with business goals.


---

11:00 AM – 11:00 PM (Flexible 3–4 hour break)

Provide technical leadership and mentor engineering teams

Define and maintain data integrity using “Golden Record” strategy

Identify and mitigate system risks proactively



---

6–8+ years of software engineering experience

Strong expertise in system architecture and scalable platforms

Hands-on experience with Python, AWS, PostgreSQL, and event-driven systems

Strong focus on reliability, observability, and engineering best practices

Proven experience in technical leadership and architecture decisions



---

⭐ Nice to Have

Experience building AI/ML platforms

Background in GTM systems, CRM, or revenue tech

Experience in data governance and AI evaluation frameworks



---

🛠️ Primary Skills

Python | AWS | PostgreSQL | Event-Driven Systems | System Architecture
